title: Artificial Analysis 在旧金山举办 Coding Agent Benchmarking 活动
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
Artificial Analysis
@ArtificialAnlys
Artificial Analysis hosted a Coding Agent Benchmarking event last night in San Francisco with speakers from Cognition, Cursor and NVIDIA
Thank you to everyone from the SF AI community who joined!
A big thank you in particular to our speakers for their fantastic talks and panel erti ( @ silasalberti ), SVP, Research @ Cognition
• Nate Schmidt, Evals & Behavior @ Cursor
• Venkat Srinivasan, Research Scientist @ NVIDIA
• George Cameron ( @ grmcameron ), Co-Founder @ Artificial Analysis
And a special thank you to Alessio ( @ FanaHOVA ) and Kernel Labs ( @ KernelLabs_ai ) for hosting us at their space.
10:34 PM · Jun 12, 2026 4.7K Views
